characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion, long straight brown hair. She has expressive facial features and natural makeup.
characters.wardrobe: Black long-sleeve top, large silver over-ear headphones, and a silver watch on her left wrist.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: सच बताऊँ? खराब English की वजह से office में लोग आपको judge करते हैं। [To tell you the truth? People judge you in the office because of poor English.]
Character A says: लेकिन Supernova नाम का एक AI app है। [But there's an AI app called Supernova.]
Character A says: जो आपकी ये problem solve कर सकता है। [Which can solve this problem.]
Character A says: इसका AI आपको real-time में English बोलने की practice कराता है। [Its AI makes you practice speaking English in real-time.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing the relatable fear of being judged for poor English at work.
- Introduces Supernova as the practical AI solution.
- Highlights the core feature of real-time speaking practice.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: खराब English की वजह से लोग judge करते हैं? [People judge because of poor English?] Try Supernova AI app. Real-time speaking practice.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Colleague. [Colleague.]
Character A says: मेरा pronunciation थोड़ा गलत था। [My pronunciation was a bit wrong.]
Character A says: Colleague. [Colleague.]
Character A says: Perfect! [Perfect!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the app's pronunciation feedback feature.
- Shows a relatable moment of making a mistake and correcting it without judgment.
- Builds trust through a practical, real-world example.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Colleague. मेरा pronunciation थोड़ा गलत था। [My pronunciation was a bit wrong.] Colleague. Perfect!

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: ये app आपकी Hindi के हिसाब से एक personalized plan बनाता है। [This app creates a personalized plan based on your Hindi.]
Character A says: ताकि आप उन English words पर focus कर सकें जिन्हें बोलने में आपको hesitation होती है। [So that you can focus on those English words that you hesitate to speak.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Explains the personalized learning approach tailored for Hindi speakers.
- Connects the learning process directly to the user's native language.
- Emphasizes overcoming hesitation and building confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Personalized plan based on your Hindi. Overcome hesitation.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: और सबसे अच्छी बात? आप AI tutor के साथ interview और office की real-life situations की practice कर सकते हैं। [And the best part? You can practice real-life situations of interviews and office with an AI tutor.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Replaces the competitor's 'Harvard coaches' hype with Supernova's core value proposition: real-life situation practice.
- Focuses on practical, career-oriented English skills that matter to the target audience.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Practice real-life situations with AI tutor. Interview & Office.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Ends with a strong, clear call to action.
- Displays the Supernova brand and encourages app download without relying on 'free trial' gimmicks.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Supernova. Download the App. Speak English Confidently.
